description: The TeleportLocomotion component is used to allow users to teleport to spots using an arc path as a location selector.

fields.BackstepDistance: How far to go backwards when pressing the backwards movement direction.
fields.ActivationTime: How long it takes for the teleport visual to show and for the locomotion to allow teleport when pressing the forward movement direction.
fields.InitialForceMin: The minimum inital arc force value for the destination selection arc.
fields.InitialForceMax: The maximum inital arc force value for the destination selection arc.
fields.RangeExp: The amount to boost the teleport range.
fields.StepUnit: What to use for the step value in the teleport arc.
fields.Drag: What to use for the drag value in the teleport arc.
fields.MaxSmallObjectSize: The maximum size to allow before a small object is not ignored for teleport destinations.
fields.WallDistance: The depth a wall has to be compared to the user's size to be considered a wall.
fields._pathMesh: The path mesh being used to display this locomotion's teleport location selector.
fields._pathMaterial: The material to control the look of that is on ``_pathMesh``.
fields._pathRenderer: The renderer of this teleport locomotion's location selector visual.
fields._pathVisual: the root slot of this teleport locomotion's location selector visual
fields._targetPointVisual: the root of the hit point visual of this teleport locomotion's location selector visual
fields._characterController: The character controller for this teleport locomotion.

usage: Used for accessibility reasons, and for puzzle games.
